description: Mobile PWA — loading, bottom nav, tools, responsive layout, service worker

tests.name: Loading overlay behavior
steps: Wait for it to dismiss (should be within 15s)
Verify main content visible after dismiss
tests.pass_criteria: Loading overlay shows then dismisses, content visible

tests.name: Bottom nav renders
steps: After mobile loads, check for bottom navigation bar
Check buttons have icons and labels
tests.pass_criteria: Bottom nav bar with 5 labeled buttons

tests.name: Tools popup
steps: Click the tools button in bottom nav
Check that tool options are listed (glossary, map, etc.)
tests.pass_criteria: Tools popup opens with tool options

tests.name: Glossary on mobile
steps: Verify glossary overlay renders full-screen on mobile
Check terms are visible and scrollable
tests.pass_criteria: Glossary overlay works in mobile layout

tests.name: Map on mobile
steps: Verify map renders in mobile viewport
tests.pass_criteria: Map renders and is usable on mobile

tests.name: Matrix on mobile
tests.pass_criteria: Matrix grid renders in mobile layout

tests.name: Timeline on mobile
tests.pass_criteria: Timeline renders and scrolls on mobile

tests.name: Hebrew on mobile
tests.pass_criteria: Hebrew letter grid works on mobile

tests.name: Text data loading
steps: Check network requests for data JSON file
Verify content renders after data loads
tests.pass_criteria: Genesis data JSON fetched successfully, content renders

tests.name: Interlinear on mobile
steps: With a text loaded, open reading pane
Click a word to check popup works
tests.pass_criteria: Interlinear renders on mobile, word popup functional

tests.name: Search on mobile
tests.pass_criteria: Search works on mobile, results navigable

tests.name: Sidebar toggle
steps: Find and click the hamburger/sidebar toggle button

tests.name: Service worker registration
steps: Use JS eval to check navigator.serviceWorker.controller
Verify a service worker is registered
Check SW scope covers the app

tests.name: Offline handling
steps: Check if app has offline indicator or graceful degradation
Verify app doesn't crash if a data request fails
Check for error messages or fallback content

tests.name: Viewport and meta tags
steps: Check viewport meta tag exists with proper mobile settings
